creator: vince@blue-box.net
text:
update libol to 0.2.20

How-To-Repeat: 
diff -ruN libol.old/Makefile libol/Makefile
--- libol.old/Makefile	Mon Aug 21 03:07:28 2000
+++ libol/Makefile	Mon Oct  2 12:04:38 2000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libol
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.17
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.20
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.balabit.hu/downloads/libol/0.2/
 
diff -ruN libol.old/files/md5 libol/files/md5
--- libol.old/files/md5	Sat Jul  1 20:24:03 2000
+++ libol/files/md5	Mon Oct  2 12:06:29 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (libol-0.2.17.tar.gz) = d21ca333b81886e13f819a9c75ef17f0
+MD5 (libol-0.2.20.tar.gz) = b9edfae35cbe19a1f9a63f8d5bd2b5ee
